description_long: This is a large, antique book with a richly embossed brown leather cover featuring intricate floral and geometric patterns. The book is secured with two metal clasps on the fore-edge, which are attached to leather straps. The spine is rounded and decorated with horizontal bands and gold-embossed text, showing signs of age and wear. The pages are thick, yellowed, and uneven, indicating significant age and use. A small paper label with a handwritten number is affixed to the upper left corner of the front cover. The overall appearance suggests a historical or rare volume, possibly from the Renaissance or early modern period.
description: A large, antique book with an ornate brown leather cover, metal clasps, and a decorated spine with gold text. The pages are thick and aged, and the cover features intricate embossed patterns.
description_view_0: The fore-edge of the book is visible, showing the thickness of the aged pages and two prominent metal clasps securing the book shut.
description_view_1: The front cover is shown, displaying detailed embossed patterns, a small paper label with a number, and one side of the metal clasps.
description_view_2: The spine is visible, featuring horizontal bands, gold-embossed text, and decorative motifs, highlighting the book's title and date.
description_view_3: The back cover is shown, mirroring the ornate embossing of the front, with the ends of the metal clasps and a small area of discoloration.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is brown leather with horizontal embossed bands and gold-embossed text. Decorative motifs are present between the bands, giving it a classic, ornate appearance.
